title: LightCraft
description: Allows you to craft invisible light blocks.
body:
Light block is very useful- it allows you to light up area whitsout random torches or lanterns.

_Unfortunatly right now it is impossible to set crafting recipe to specific potion: so right now any potion will work. Later when it's possible I will limit it only to invisibility potion._

To craft you need 1 potion and eigth of the following list: shroomlight, sea lantern, any froglight, glowstone. Recepie is shapeless.

**Here is crafting recepie example**
![Recepie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cfc463f7a238ec820b46d48e55005a6bb9488bce.png)

If you encounter any problems, write to Discord j_mastepro.
